name: Ukuhlolwa Kokuphelelwa Amanzi
description: Ukuhlolwa kwendawo yokuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni kanye nobunzima bokugula kokushisa. Umbala womchamo uyinkomba yensimu esebenza kakhulu. Hlola isimo somqondo njengomaka wokuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni kakhulu okuqhubekela ekushiseni.
instructions: Hlola umbala womchamo, i-skin turgor, isimo sengqondo, nezimpawu ezibalulekile. Umchamo omnyama, ulwelwesi lwamafinyila olomile, kanye ne-tachycardia kubonisa ukuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni okudinga ukuvuselelwa okusebenzayo.

categories.label: Igaywe Kahle
categories.description: Uphuzi ophuzi ukuze uhlanze umchamo. Akukho ukungenelela okudingekayo.

categories.label: Ukuphelelwa amanzi kwamanzi Okumaphakathi
categories.description: Umchamo ophuzi ngokumnyama, womile. Ukubuyisela amanzi emanzini ngomlomo. Khuthaza u-250-500 ml wamanzi ngehora.

categories.label: Ukuphelelwa Amanzi Okuqinile Okumaphakathi
categories.description: Umchamo we-amber, ukuphakama kwe-HR, i-skin turgor yehla, umlomo owomile. IV/IO uketshezi uma ngomlomo kungabekezeleleki. I-1-2L LR noma i-NS.

categories.label: Ingozi -- I-Heat Stroke / Enzima
categories.description: Ukukhipha umchamo okuncane, i-LOC eshintshile, isikhumba esomile esishisayo. Isimo esiphuthumayo sezokwelapha -- ukupholisa okusheshayo + uketshezi lwe-IV + MEDEVAC.

pediatric.note: Izingane ziphelelwa amanzi ngokushesha kunabantu abadala. I-Sunken fontanelle (izinsana), izinyembezi ezingekho, nokukhathala kuyizimpawu ezibucayi. Isisindo esisekelwe ku-IV: 20 mL/kg LR bolus.

obstetric.note: Abesifazane abakhulelwe badinga uketshezi olwandisiwe. Ukuphelelwa amanzi emzimbeni kungabangela ukufinyela ngaphambi kwesikhathi. Ukuvuselela ngomlomo ngomlomo kuqala; IV uma ungabekezeleli ngomlomo.

source: PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine / US Army Hot Weather Ops
